docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-12-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NANCY OKUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOHAMAD ALDULDINI IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY OKUN, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT ALDULDINI, MOHAMAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
